ASR Outdoor 3pc Gold Pans with Bottle Snuffer Gold Panning Kit (Many Styles)

Strike gold on your next adventure with the ASR Outdoor 3pc Gold Panning Kit - perfect for both beginners and seasoned prospectors alike! This essential field-ready kit includes two rugged gold pans (your choice of 10" or 12" diameter) and a 3oz snuffer bottle, giving you everything you need to start collecting paydirt and extracting gold right out of the streambed.

Key Features

  • COMPLETE 3PC KIT - Includes two gold pans (10" or 12") and a 3oz snuffer bottle - everything you need to start gold panning right out of the box.
  • HEAVY-DUTY GOLD PANS - Made from durable ABS plastic, built to endure rugged outdoor conditions without cracking or warping.
  • DUAL RIFFLE DESIGN - Each pan features both coarse and fine riffles to efficiently capture gold flakes, dust, and small nuggets.
  • PRECISION SNUFFER BOTTLE - 3oz suction bottle with a secure travel cap makes it easy to collect fine gold and concentrate your findings.
  • IDEAL FOR ALL SKILL LEVELS - Great for beginners and experienced prospectors alike - perfect for rivers, creeks, or backyard test panning.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DRIFFPARENT

Crafted from high-quality, heavy-duty ABS plastic, the gold pans are built to withstand rough use in any environment. Each pan features dual riffles - coarse and fine - to trap even the smallest gold flakes and nuggets with maximum efficiency. Whether you're wet or dry panning, these pans deliver consistent, reliable results.

The included 3oz snifter bottle is ideal for precision work. At 5" tall and fitted with a secure travel cap, it’s easy to carry and designed for quick suction, letting you isolate and collect fine gold with ease.

Whether you're out in the mountains or testing soil in your backyard, this compact yet complete gold panning kit ensures you're always ready to prospect. Don’t hit the river without it - gear up and get panning!
